faq.heading: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.subheading: Answers to the most common questions about our services, rituals, and products

faqs.q: How do I book a service?
faqs.a: Simply tap 'Book on WhatsApp' on any service page. Our customer service will confirm your booking and guide you through the process.
Yes — all rituals are performed at the Longhu Mountain Tianshi Mansion altar. You receive a full video of your ceremony before shipping.

faqs.q: How do I know the ritual was performed?
faqs.a: You will receive a custom video showing your name being written and the full consecration sequence — no exceptions.
Rituals are performed within 3-5 business days after booking. Shipping to US and Europe takes 7-14 days.

faqs.q: What payment methods do you accept?
faqs.a: We accept payments via bank transfer, Wise, or PayPal — all handled through WhatsApp after booking.
Each ritual is personalized and performed for you. Once the ceremony is filmed with your name, returns are not accepted.

faqs.q: What is Qi Men Dun Jia?
faqs.a: Qi Men Dun Jia (奇门遁甲) is an ancient Chinese strategic divination system used for decision-making and timing.

faqs.q: Do I need to know Chinese or Taoism?
faqs.a: Not at all. All services are offered in English and designed for Western seekers.

faqs.q: Can I buy products as gifts?
faqs.a: Absolutely. Just let us know the recipient's name and intention during booking.
